---
title: "Section 1 Import and Communicate Assignment"
author: "My Ha"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

## Section 1: Import and Communicate Assignment

Data 332 Section \# **02**

Student name: **My Ha**

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(writexl)
```

```{r}
# read xlsx and assign to a variable
xlsx_file<-read_xlsx("Data332_Section 1 Assignment.xlsx")
#
# Print the File to confirm
print (read_xlsx("Data332_Section 1 Assignment.xlsx"))
```

```{r}
# View the File
xlsx_file
```

\# The top row are the column names and the data types for each column \# shown below with "\< \>" designations #Check Global environment for the file and verify contents

```{r}
str(xlsx_file)
```

```{r}
library(tibble)
library(purrr)
Excel_datatypes <- tibble( column = names(xlsx_file),
type = map_chr(xlsx_file,
- paste(class(.x), collapse = ", ")) )
print (Excel_datatypes)

```
